emails.subject: Pac(t)
emails.body: Pac(t) Holden I need to true this transmiision up, any word on those two resevations? Mike P. Purcell Settlements Coordinator Volume Management-Portland 503-464-8297

emails.subject: RE: Pac(t)
emails.body: RE: Pac(t) Brian McClellan is speaking to Tarcy about this and is getting back to me. He seems to think that Tarcy will insist that they cannot change the price. I don't want to pay this. Thanks To: Salisbury, Holden

emails.subject: RE: Pac(t)
emails.body: RE: Pac(t) I have updated the deal numbers 727040 and 737214 to how I think it should be valued. When it comes down to it the differential will probably not be that large. Let me know what the difference is now. Thanks, Holden To: Salisbury, Holden

emails.subject: RE: Pac(t)
emails.body: The numbers now reflect a variance of Pac 89,656.64 E 88,560.12 dif 1096.52 This small differnce I can divide among the desks. MP To: Purcell, Mike
